title: Bare Bones x Supplementaries
description: This pack adds Bare Bones textures for Supplementaries mod ! 🔑
body:
![Bare Bones x Supplementaries logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/416d97ecd431b4b11009f46b205a608f7015467a.png)
-----------

This resource pack adds Bare Bones textures to [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) !

- I highly recommend using [Bare Bones x Mods](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-mods) instead of this pack - It's a more convenient way to use my Bare Bones compatibility packs !
